creator: ports@nicandneal.net
text:
(In reply to Kirill Ponomarew from comment #3)

OK, I don't understand this. I've just done a poudriere testport run with success. 

This does require the latest version of the compiler, which you had just committed beforehand, so maybe it was still using the old one.

Please could you try again, just in case that was the problem.
